instructions.summary: Trigger a Vercel redeploy — waitlist API fix is committed but stuck
instructions.detail: The waitlist signup API was returning 500 on every request (Prisma bundling crash). Fixed in commit 8bee9be — simplified to Resend-only, no DB dependency. RESEND_API_KEY is already set on Vercel. The fix is pushed but: (1) API deploy limit hit (100/day exhausted), (2) GitHub webhook has not triggered despite correct git identity. Production is stuck on broken code. Every signup attempt right now silently fails.
instructions.exact_action:
Open https://vercel.com/eidolons-projects-e72c0917/verdedesk/deployments

Click 'Deploy' button at the top right, select 'main' branch, confirm.

Or alternatively, click the three-dot menu on the latest READY deployment and choose 'Redeploy' — but note that will re-deploy the old code, not the fix. Best option is to trigger a new deploy from the main branch.
instructions.unblocks: Waitlist signups — every signup attempt currently returns 500 silently
